systemStatus: AI CEO running Korea public-data market engine

company.mission: 한국 공공·정부·조달·창업지원 공개 신호를 최대한 수집하고, 수익성 높은 사업을 고르고, 다음 실험을 설계하는 AI CEO 대시보드입니다.
company.currentGoal: 무료 공개/공공 데이터만으로 한국 시장 1순위 사업 결정

decision.summary: 한국 입찰·제안서 AI 작성 도구가 현재 한국 시장 1순위입니다. 전체 공개 신호 73개, 공공/정부/조달 신호 0개, 수익성/제작용이성/공공데이터 적합도/위험도를 반영했습니다.
decision.reason: 무료 공개/공공 신호 기준으로 한국 입찰·제안서 AI 작성 도구가 가장 강합니다. 공공 신호 0개가 수집되었고, 공공데이터 적합도와 수익성이 모두 높아 첫 MVP 실험 대상으로 선정합니다.

experiment.title: 한국 입찰·제안서 AI 작성 도구 48시간 한국 시장 검증
experiment.hypothesis: 입찰 참여 중소기업, SI 업체, 용역 회사는 입찰 공고 요약 + 제안서 초안 + 제출 체크리스트에 비용을 지불할 가능성이 있다.
experiment.nextAction: 나라장터 제안서 체크리스트와 샘플 생성 페이지 제작

ideas.name: 한국 입찰·제안서 AI 작성 도구
ideas.summary: 한국 중소기업의 입찰·제안서 작성 부담을 줄이는 문서 자동화 서비스입니다. 신호 21개, 공공신호 0개, 수익성 92, 제작용이성 70, 공공데이터적합도 90, 위험도 58.
ideas.target: 입찰 참여 중소기업, SI 업체, 용역 회사

fisallllll280-code/VAIXLNS: رجعت للفهرس الكامل السابق. المشكلة ليست في فكرة VAIXLNS، المشكلة أن الحزم الأخيرة دخلت فوق بعضها بدون مرجع مركزي. قبل أي توليد جديد لازم نثبت Genesis Index + Build Pipeline ونربط كل الابتكارات السابقة داخله. سأعيد ترتيبها كحزمة واحدة (نسخة دمج)، تشمل: VAIXLNS GENESIS MASTER INDEX v0.3 0. المبدأ الأساسي V = Governance VX = Deterministic Execution XV = Intelligence / Prediction VAMM = Meta Model + Compiler SRE Ω = Stability + Recovery + Evolution LNS = Knowledge + Evidence Memory AURX = Network Fabric القانون: NO EVIDENCE ↓ NO GOVERNANCE FINALITY ↓ NO EXECUTION ⸻ 1. Core Runtime src/core/ ├── kernel.ts ├── atomic-executor.ts ├── ledger.ts ├── rollback-manager.ts ├── state-machine.ts ├── event-bus.ts └── deterministic-runtime.ts المسؤولية: * Event يدخل * Decision ينتج * Ledger يسجل * State يتغير * Rollback متوفر ⸻ 2. VX Kernel VX Kernel العقد: Event ↓ Validation ↓ Governance Check ↓ Finality Certificate ↓ Atomic Execution ↓ Ledger Commit ممنوع: Direct Mutation Randomness External Side Effect إلا عبر Ledger. ⸻ 3. Ledger System تعديل الجدول: CREATE TABLE ledger ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_id TEXT, type TEXT, payload TEXT, prev_hash TEXT, hash TEXT, timestamp TEXT ); السلسلة: BLOCK1 hash=A BLOCK2 prev_hash=A hash=B BLOCK3 prev_hash=B hash=C ⸻ 4. VAMM Compiler المسار: YAML Artifact ↓ Parser ↓ Semantic Analyzer ↓ IR ↓ Planner ↓ Generator ↓ Verifier ↓ Runtime المجلد: vamm/ ├── meta-model.yaml ├── master-index.yaml ├── artifacts/ ├── blueprints/ └── templates/ ⸻ 5. VAMM Artifact Model كل شيء يصبح Artifact: id: kind: version: contract: implementation: tests: lifecycle: evidence: الأنواع: Specification Capability Runtime Agent Policy Decision Evidence Event Test Release ⸻ 6. Agent Factory المولد: Artifact | | Blueprint | | Agent Contract | | Generated Agent | | Evidence Hash الناتج: generated/ agents/ VV-Agent.ts AA-Agent.ts II-Agent.ts XX-Agent.ts *.evidence.yaml ⸻ 7. SRE Ω Layer Ω.70.08 Stability Engine المكونات: Volatility Drift Directionality Consistency الناتج: Stability Score يذهب إلى: Sphere PSE Collapse Detection Governance ⸻ 8. Predictive Engine Ω.70.10 وظيفته: Current State ↓ Temporal Analysis ↓ Future State Probability المخرجات: prediction: risk: confidence: trajectory: ⸻ 9. Collapse Detection Ω.70.09 يراقب: High Volatility High Drift Negative Direction Low Consistency Low Stability Score الناتج: Collapse Event ⸻ 10. Recovery Engine Ω.70.12 بعد الانهيار: Incident ↓ Diagnosis ↓ Recovery Plan ↓ Evidence Token ⸻ 11. Self Healing Manifest Ω.70.13 المسار: Incident ↓ Manifest Engine ↓ Improvement Proposal ↓ Simulation ↓ Governance ↓ Compiler ↓ Atomic Patch ⸻ 12. Governance Finality Finality Gate: if( entropy > threshold ) reject(); if( evidence missing ) reject(); if( quorum failed ) reject(); FINALIZED الناتج: FinalityCertificate ⸻ 13. Entropy Bound Finality إضافة جديدة: النظام لا يغير نفسه أثناء الفوضى. قاعدة: High Entropy = No Evolution ⸻ 14. Atomic Evolution Loop الدورة الكاملة: Observe ↓ Analyze ↓ Predict ↓ Recover ↓ Generate Improvement ↓ Simulate ↓ Govern ↓ Compile ↓ Atomic Swap ↓ Verify ↓ Learn ⸻ 15. Repository النهائي VAIXLNS/ ├── vamm/ │ │── meta-model.yaml │── master-index.yaml │ ├── src/ │ │── core/ │ ├── kernel.ts │ ├── ledger.ts │ ├── atomic-executor.ts │ │── vamm/ │ ├── compiler.ts │ ├── generator.ts │ │── agents/ │ │── sre/ │ ├── stability/ │ ├── predictive/ │ ├── collapse/ │ ├── recovery/ │ └── self-healing/ │ │── governance/ │ ├── finality.ts │ │── vx/ │ └── runtime.ts │ ├── generated/ │ ├── tests/ │ └── package.json ⸻ 16. التشغيل النهائي npm install npm run build npm run test npm run generate npm run genesis النتيجة: ✔ VAMM Loaded ✔ Semantic Graph Built ✔ Agents Generated ✔ Evidence Created ✔ Stability Online ✔ Governance Ready ✔ VX Runtime Started ✔ Genesis Loop Complete ⸻ هذا هو الفهرس المرجعي. أي ملف جديد يدخل بعد الآن يجب أن يرتبط بهذا المسار، وليس يضاف كفكرة منفصلة. الخطوة الصحيحة بعدها: توليد الحزمة التنفيذية الكاملة v0.3 ملفاً ملفاً بناءً على هذا الفهرس، وليس إضافة طبقات جديدة.أفهم طلبك: أنت لا تريد إعادة صياغة المعمارية، تريد فهرس تنفيذ (Execution Index) مضبوط يكون هو المرجع الذي تُبنى عليه الملفات والكود. الخطأ السابق كان أنه أعاد وصف الطبقات ولم يحوّلها إلى خطة بناء قابلة للتحويل إلى مستودع. هذا هو الفهرس التنفيذي الصحيح لـ VAIXLNS Genesis v0.3: VAIXLNS-GENESIS/ 00-CONTRACTS/ │ ├── system-contract.yaml ├── artifact-contract.yaml ├── event-contract.yaml ├── decision-contract.yaml ├── evidence-contract.yaml └── finality-contract.yaml 01-VAMM-COMPILER/ │ ├── meta-model.yaml ├── master-index.yaml │ ├── src/ │ ├── parser/ │ │ └── yaml-parser.ts │ │ │ ├── semantic/ │ │ └── semantic-analyzer.ts │ │ │ ├── ir/ │ │ └── artifact-ir.ts │ │ │ ├── planner/ │ │ └── generation-planner.ts │ │ │ ├── generator/ │ │ ├── generator.ts │ │ └── agent-factory.ts │ │ │ └── verifier/ │ └── compiler-verifier.ts 02-VX-RUNTIME/ │ ├── kernel/ │ ├── vx-kernel.ts │ ├── state-machine.ts │ └── execution-boundary.ts │ ├── events/ │ ├── event-bus.ts │ └── event-types.ts │ ├── decision/ │ └── decision-engine.ts │ └── runtime.ts 03-LEDGER/ │ ├── ledger.ts ├── hash-chain.ts ├── snapshot.ts ├── replay-engine.ts └── integrity-checker.ts 04-GOVERNANCE/ │ ├── finality-engine.ts ├── quorum-validator.ts ├── entropy-gate.ts ├── policy-engine.ts └── certificates/ 05-SRE-OMEGA/ │ ├── stability/ │ └── stability-engine.ts │ ├── predictive/ │ └── predictive-engine.ts │ ├── collapse/ │ └── collapse-detector.ts │ ├── recovery/ │ └── recovery-engine.ts │ └── self-healing/ ├── manifest-engine.ts ├── simulator.ts └── improvement-proposal.ts 06-AGENT-SYSTEM/ │ ├── agent-contract.ts ├── agent-runtime.ts ├── memory/ │ ├── ephemeral.ts │ ├── persistent.ts │ └── ledger-memory.ts │ └── generated/ 07-LNS-KNOWLEDGE/ │ ├── knowledge-store.ts ├── evidence-store.ts └── provenance-chain.ts 08-AURX-NETWORK/ │ ├── node-registry.ts ├── communication.ts └── discovery.ts 09-VERIFICATION/ │ ├── validator.ts ├── conformance-tests.ts ├── replay-tests.ts └── determinism-tests.ts 10-CLI/ │ ├── commands/ │ ├── build.ts │ ├── validate.ts │ ├── trace.ts │ ├── generate.ts │ └── genesis.ts │ └── cli.ts 11-TESTS/ │ ├── ledger.test.ts ├── kernel.test.ts ├── governance.test.ts ├── stability.test.ts ├── compiler.test.ts ├── agent-factory.test.ts └── end-to-end.genesis.test.ts 12-OUTPUT/ │ ├── generated-agents/ ├── generated-runtime/ ├── evidence/ ├── certificates/ └── reports/ ترتيب التنفيذ الإجباري: Phase 1 00-CONTRACTS 03-LEDGER 02-VX-RUNTIME Phase 2 04-GOVERNANCE 09-VERIFICATION Phase 3 05-SRE-OMEGA Phase 4 01-VAMM-COMPILER Phase 5 06-AGENT-SYSTEM Phase 6 10-CLI + Genesis Loop أول نسخة قابلة للتشغيل لا تبدأ بالـ Agent Factory ولا الـ Dashboard. تبدأ بهذه الثلاثة فقط: Ledger + VX Kernel + Governance Finality لأنها هي النواة التي تثبت أن النظام يعمل. بعد تثبيت هذا الفهرس، التنفيذ يكون ملفاً ملفاً بنفس المسارات، وليس توسعة أفكار جديدة.أنت محق في نقطة مهمة: الفهرس السابق ركّز على النواة التنفيذية فقط، لكنه أسقط الطبقات التي طلبتها سابقًا: واجهات التحكم، الوكلاء، اللغات، والمصنع الكامل. هذا ليس فهرس VAIXLNS الكامل. هذا هو الفهرس المصحح الذي يجمع Core + Control Plane + Agents + Languages + Compiler + UI: VAIXLNS-GENESIS/ 00-CONSTITUTION/ │ ├── genesis-manifest.yaml ├── sovereignty-rules.yaml ├── system-contracts/ │ ├── artifact-contract.yaml │ ├── agent-contract.yaml │ ├── event-contract.yaml │ ├── decision-contract.yaml │ └── evidence-contract.yaml 01-VAMM-COMPILER/ │ ├── meta-model/ │ └── meta-model.yaml │ ├── compiler/ │ ├── parser/ │ ├── semantic-engine/ │ ├── intermediate-representation/ │ ├── planner/ │ ├── generator/ │ └── verifier/ │ ├── languages/ │ ├── VQL/ │ │ ├── grammar.vql │ │ ├── parser.ts │ │ └── executor.ts │ │ │ ├── VIX/ │ │ ├── specification.vix │ │ ├── compiler.ts │ │ └── runtime.ts │ │ │ └── VASM/ │ ├── syntax │ └── assembler.ts 02-VX-SOVEREIGN-RUNTIME/ │ ├── kernel/ │ ├── vx-kernel.ts │ ├── scheduler.ts │ ├── decision-engine.ts │ └── execution-boundary.ts │ ├── state/ │ ├── state-machine.ts │ └── replay-engine.ts │ ├── event-system/ │ ├── event-bus.ts │ └── event-stream.ts │ └── runtime-manager.ts 03-AGENT-ECOSYSTEM/ │ ├── agent-runtime/ │ ├── agent-factory/ │ ├── agent-registry/ │ ├── agents/ │ │ ├── VV/ │ │ └── Verification-Vision-Agent │ │ │ ├── AA/ │ │ └── Analysis-Architecture-Agent │ │ │ ├── II/ │ │ └── Identity-Intelligence-Agent │ │ │ ├── XX/ │ │ └── Execution-Agent │ │ │ ├── LL/ │ │ └── Ledger-Agent │ │ │ ├── NN/ │ │ └── Network-Agent │ │ │ └── SS/ │ └── Security-Agent │ └── agent-memory/ 04-SRE-OMEGA/ │ ├── stability-engine/ ├── predictive-engine/ ├── collapse-detection/ ├── recovery-engine/ ├── self-healing/ └── evolution-engine/ 05-GOVERNANCE-CONTROL-PLANE/ │ ├── governance-engine/ ├── finality-engine/ ├── policy-engine/ ├── certificate-manager/ │ ├── dashboards/ │ │ ├── Sovereign Dashboard │ │ │ ├── Runtime Dashboard │ │ │ ├── Stability Dashboard │ │ │ ├── Agent Fleet Dashboard │ │ │ ├── Evidence Dashboard │ │ │ └── Governance Approval Dashboard │ └── human-console/ 06-FLIGHT-DECK/ │ ├── web-ui/ │ ├── mobile-console/ │ ├── realtime-monitor/ │ ├── graph-viewer/ │ ├── timeline-viewer/ │ └── incident-console/ 07-LNS-KNOWLEDGE-SYSTEM/ │ ├── knowledge-engine/ ├── semantic-memory/ ├── evidence-store/ ├── provenance-chain/ └── institutional-memory/ 08-AURX-NETWORK/ │ ├── node-fabric/ ├── service-discovery/ ├── secure-channel/ └── network-orchestration/ 09-DATA-PLATFORM/ │ ├── ledger/ ├── database/ ├── vector-store/ ├── event-store/ └── telemetry/ 10-OBSERVABILITY/ │ ├── OpenTelemetry ├── Metrics ├── Logs ├── Traces ├── Causal-Debugger └── Reality-Map 11-SECURITY/ │ ├── identity/ ├── encryption/ ├── secrets/ ├── threat-detection/ └── shield-engine/ 12-DEV-FACTORY/ │ ├── repository-generator ├── code-generator ├── test-generator ├── documentation-generator └── release-generator 13-CLI/ │ ├── vamm ├── vx ├── sre ├── agent ├── governance └── genesis 14-TESTING/ │ ├── unit-tests ├── integration-tests ├── simulation-tests ├── determinism-tests ├── chaos-tests └── proof-tests الآن الصورة كاملة: * الشاشات موجودة → Flight Deck + Control Plane * الوكلاء موجودون → VV / AA / II / XX / LL / NN / SS * اللغات موجودة → VQL + VIX + VASM * المترجم موجود → VAMM Compiler * النواة موجودة → VX Runtime * الذاكرة موجودة → LNS * التشبيك موجود → AURX * الاستقرار والتطور موجود → SRE Ω * التوليد الآلي موجود → Dev Factory لكن التنفيذ الصحيح لا يبدأ بكتابة كل هذا دفعة واحدة؛ يبدأ ببناء Genesis v0.1 قابل للتشغيل ثم تتولد بقية الطبقات من VAMM. أي محاولة لكتابة كل المجلدات مرة واحدة ستنتج هيكل ضخم غير قابل للاختبار.

Genesis v0.3: VAIXLNS-GENESIS/ 00-CONTRACTS/ │ ├── system-contract.yaml ├── artifact-contract.yaml ├── event-contract.yaml ├── decision-contract.yaml ├── evidence-contract.yaml └── finality-contract.yaml 01-VAMM-COMPILER/ │ ├── meta-model.yaml ├── master-index.yaml │ ├── src/ │ ├── parser/ │ │ └── yaml-parser.ts │ │ │ ├── semantic/ │ │ └── semantic-analyzer.ts │ │ │ ├── ir/ │ │ └── artifact-ir.ts │ │ │ ├── planner/ │ │ └── generation-planner.ts │ │ │ ├── generator/ │ │ ├── generator.ts │ │ └── agent-factory.ts │ │ │ └── verifier/ │ └── compiler-verifier.ts 02-VX-RUNTIME/ │ ├── kernel/ │ ├── vx-kernel.ts │ ├── state-machine.ts │ └── execution-boundary.ts │ ├── events/ │ ├── event-bus.ts │ └── event-types.ts │ ├── decision/ │ └── decision-engine.ts │ └── runtime.ts 03-LEDGER/ │ ├── ledger.ts ├── hash-chain.ts ├── snapshot.ts ├── replay-engine.ts └── integrity-checker.ts 04-GOVERNANCE/ │ ├── finality-engine.ts ├── quorum-validator.ts ├── entropy-gate.ts ├── policy-engine.ts └── certificates/ 05-SRE-OMEGA/ │ ├── stability/ │ └── stability-engine.ts │ ├── predictive/ │ └── predictive-engine.ts │ ├── collapse/ │ └── collapse-detector.ts │ ├── recovery/ │ └── recovery-engine.ts │ └── self-healing/ ├── manifest-engine.ts ├── simulator.ts └── improvement-proposal.ts 06-AGENT-SYSTEM/ │ ├── agent-contract.ts ├── agent-runtime.ts ├── memory/ │ ├── ephemeral.ts │ ├── persistent.ts │ └── ledger-memory.ts │ └── generated/ 07-LNS-KNOWLEDGE/ │ ├── knowledge-store.ts ├── evidence-store.ts └── provenance-chain.ts 08-AURX-NETWORK/ │ ├── node-registry.ts ├── communication.ts └── discovery.ts 09-VERIFICATION/ │ ├── validator.ts ├── conformance-tests.ts ├── replay-tests.ts └── determinism-tests.ts 10-CLI/ │ ├── commands/ │ ├── build.ts │ ├── validate.ts │ ├── trace.ts │ ├── generate.ts │ └── genesis.ts │ └── cli.ts 11-TESTS/ │ ├── ledger.test.ts ├── kernel.test.ts ├── governance.test.ts ├── stability.test.ts ├── compiler.test.ts ├── agent-factory.test.ts └── end-to-end.genesis.test.ts 12-OUTPUT/ │ ├── generated-agents/ ├── generated-runtime/ ├── evidence/ ├── certificates/ └── reports/ ترتيب التنفيذ الإجباري: Phase 1 00-CONTRACTS 03-LEDGER 02-VX-RUNTIME Phase 2 04-GOVERNANCE 09-VERIFICATION Phase 3 05-SRE-OMEGA Phase 4 01-VAMM-COMPILER Phase 5 06-AGENT-SYSTEM Phase 6 10-CLI + Genesis Loop أول نسخة قابلة للتشغيل لا تبدأ بالـ Agent Factory ولا الـ Dashboard. تبدأ بهذه الثلاثة فقط: Ledger + VX Kernel + Governance Finality لأنها هي النواة التي تثبت أن النظام يعمل. بعد تثبيت هذا الفهرس، التنفيذ يكون ملفاً ملفاً بنفس المسارات، وليس توسعة أفكار جديدة.أنت محق في نقطة مهمة: الفهرس السابق ركّز على النواة التنفيذية فقط، لكنه أسقط الطبقات التي طلبتها سابقًا: واجهات التحكم، الوكلاء، اللغات، والمصنع الكامل. هذا ليس فهرس VAIXLNS الكامل. هذا هو الفهرس المصحح الذي يجمع Core + Control Plane + Agents + Languages + Compiler + UI: VAIXLNS-GENESIS/ 00-CONSTITUTION/ │ ├── genesis-manifest.yaml ├── sovereignty-rules.yaml ├── system-contracts/ │ ├── artifact-contract.yaml │ ├── agent-contract.yaml │ ├── event-contract.yaml │ ├── decision-contract.yaml │ └── evidence-contract.yaml 01-VAMM-COMPILER/ │ ├── meta-model/ │ └── meta-model.yaml │ ├── compiler/ │ ├── parser/ │ ├── semantic-engine/ │ ├── intermediate-representation/ │ ├── planner/ │ ├── generator/ │ └── verifier/ │ ├── languages/ │ ├── VQL/ │ │ ├── grammar.vql │ │ ├── parser.ts │ │ └── executor.ts │ │ │ ├── VIX/ │ │ ├── specification.vix │ │ ├── compiler.ts │ │ └── runtime.ts │ │ │ └── VASM/ │ ├── syntax │ └── assembler.ts 02-VX-SOVEREIGN-RUNTIME/ │ ├── kernel/ │ ├── vx-kernel.ts │ ├── scheduler.ts │ ├── decision-engine.ts │ └── execution-boundary.ts │ ├── state/ │ ├── state-machine.ts │ └── replay-engine.ts │ ├── event-system/ │ ├── event-bus.ts │ └── event-stream.ts │ └── runtime-manager.ts 03-AGENT-ECOSYSTEM/ │ ├── agent-runtime/ │ ├── agent-factory/ │ ├── agent-registry/ │ ├── agents/ │ │ ├── VV/ │ │ └── Verification-Vision-Agent │ │ │ ├── AA/ │ │ └── Analysis-Architecture-Agent │ │ │ ├── II/ │ │ └── Identity-Intelligence-Agent │ │ │ ├── XX/ │ │ └── Execution-Agent │ │ │ ├── LL/ │ │ └── Ledger-Agent │ │ │ ├── NN/ │ │ └── Network-Agent │ │ │ └── SS/ │ └── Security-Agent │ └── agent-memory/ 04-SRE-OMEGA/ │ ├── stability-engine/ ├── predictive-engine/ ├── collapse-detection/ ├── recovery-engine/ ├── self-healing/ └── evolution-engine/ 05-GOVERNANCE-CONTROL-PLANE/ │ ├── governance-engine/ ├── finality-engine/ ├── policy-engine/ ├── certificate-manager/ │ ├── dashboards/ │ │ ├── Sovereign Dashboard │ │ │ ├── Runtime Dashboard │ │ │ ├── Stability Dashboard │ │ │ ├── Agent Fleet Dashboard │ │ │ ├── Evidence Dashboard │ │ │ └── Governance Approval Dashboard │ └── human-console/ 06-FLIGHT-DECK/ │ ├── web-ui/ │ ├── mobile-console/ │ ├── realtime-monitor/ │ ├── graph-viewer/ │ ├── timeline-viewer/ │ └── incident-console/ 07-LNS-KNOWLEDGE-SYSTEM/ │ ├── knowledge-engine/ ├── semantic-memory/ ├── evidence-store/ ├── provenance-chain/ └── institutional-memory/ 08-AURX-NETWORK/ │ ├── node-fabric/ ├── service-discovery/ ├── secure-channel/ └── network-orchestration/ 09-DATA-PLATFORM/ │ ├── ledger/ ├── database/ ├── vector-store/ ├── event-store/ └── telemetry/ 10-OBSERVABILITY/ │ ├── OpenTelemetry ├── Metrics ├── Logs ├── Traces ├── Causal-Debugger └── Reality-Map 11-SECURITY/ │ ├── identity/ ├── encryption/ ├── secrets/ ├── threat-detection/ └── shield-engine/ 12-DEV-FACTORY/ │ ├── repository-generator ├── code-generator ├── test-generator ├── documentation-generator └── release-generator 13-CLI/ │ ├── vamm ├── vx ├── sre ├── agent ├── governance └── genesis 14-TESTING/ │ ├── unit-tests ├── integration-tests ├── simulation-tests ├── determinism-tests ├── chaos-tests └── proof-tests الآن الصورة كاملة: * الشاشات موجودة → Flight Deck + Control Plane * الوكلاء موجودون → VV / AA / II / XX / LL / NN / SS * اللغات موجودة → VQL + VIX + VASM * المترجم موجود → VAMM Compiler * النواة موجودة → VX Runtime * الذاكرة موجودة → LNS * التشبيك موجود → AURX * الاستقرار والتطور موجود → SRE Ω * التوليد الآلي موجود → Dev Factory لكن التنفيذ الصحيح لا يبدأ بكتابة كل هذا دفعة واحدة؛ يبدأ ببناء Genesis v0.1 قابل للتشغيل ثم تتولد بقية الطبقات من VAMM. أي محاولة لكتابة كل المجلدات مرة واحدة ستنتج هيكل ضخم غير قابل للاختبار.

anisur81/Devsecops-full-roadmap-docs: This is a Complete structured DevSecOps Roadmap Documentation for integration, development, security, and operations, covering tools, CI/CD pipelines, automation, compliance, LMA and secure software delivery lifecycle practices.

pavanthakor/crimegpt-copilot: One case entry → complete investigation intelligence. AI copilot for Indian police: document automation + legal RAG + cybercrime intelligence, aligned to BNS/BNSS/BSA. Case-centric AI copilot that automates police paperwork and cybercrime investigation — FIR to charge sheet, with built-in BNS/BNSS/BSA compliance

tpt-solutions/tpt-relay: Open-source, memory-safe substation automation and SCADA platform written in Rust. Implements IEC 61850, DNP3, and Modbus TCP for grid protection, real-time load/frequency control, and self-healing fault response — built toward NERC CIP compliance as a low-cost alternative to proprietary systems.
youngwolf2077-a11y/gmail-postmaster-tools-mcp: Access Gmail Postmaster Tools metrics and sender data directly within your MCP clients using local authentication.

cliffordodendaal/JML-Workflow-Option2: End‑to‑end **Joiner–Mover–Leaver automation** built on a hybrid identity model. This lab demonstrates how **Sage HR** lifecycle events flow into **Jira Service Management** for approvals, trigger **Azure Automation Runbooks**, and orchestrate changes across **on‑prem Active Directory**, **Exchange hybrid**, and **Entra ID** using **Graph API**.
